result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedColumn) column "ownerid" does not exist
LINE 1: SELECT ownerid, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
               ^

[SQL: SELECT ownerid, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11'
GROUP BY ownerid
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT ownerid, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11'
GROUP BY ownerid
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT ownerid, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11'
GROUP BY ownerid
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC;

args.query:
SELECT ownerid, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS handled_cases
FROM (
  SELECT caseid__c, oldvalue__c AS ownerid
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT caseid__c, newvalue__c AS ownerid
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11'
) AS owners
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) > 0;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT ownerid, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS handled_cases
FROM (
  SELECT caseid__c, oldvalue__c AS ownerid
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT caseid__c, newvalue__c AS ownerid
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11'
) AS owners
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) > 0;

args.query:
SELECT ch.caseid__c, MIN(ch.createddate) AS first_change_date
FROM casehistory__c ch
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
GROUP BY ch.caseid__c;

exec_args.sql:

WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
GROUP BY ch.caseid__c;

             ^

"There are no owner transfer records in the last 4 quarters (2022-04-10 to 2023-04-10) in the available data, so it is not possible to identify an agent with the fewest transfer counts over that period."
